Bug / Task Description: The preserve-mode redaction applies its 'keep some edge characters' behavior to values that are too short, so short matched values reveal characters that should be fully masked. The partial-reveal behavior must only apply once a matched value is longer than the small threshold; at or below it the value should be fully redacted. Fix the length threshold so short values are fully masked and only longer values keep their edge characters.
Commit Subject: fix(redaction): only preserve edge characters for long-enough values
